channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Heavy Snowfall Deepens Alberta’s Snowpacks and Eases Drought Concerns
item.description: Recent reports indicate that Alberta’s snowpacks have grown significantly deeper this year, particularly along the B.C.-Alberta border, due to an extended period of heavy snowfall. Ski resorts in the ...

item.title: Jamie Laing and Sophie Habboo Document Their Pregnancy and Early Parenthood in New Series
item.description: Jamie Laing and Sophie Habboo, known for their time on Made in Chelsea, are opening up once again to audiences with their latest documentary, Raising Chelsea. The three-part series follows the couple ...

item.title: Four victims recovered by Israeli teams after Iran strike
item.description: Israeli rescue teams have confirmed that they recovered four bodies from the site of a missile strike in Iran. The incident comes amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, with ongoing conflicts in...

item.title: PM Shehbaz expresses concern over injuries to Pakistanis in UAE following missile interception linked to Iran conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has voiced sincere concern after three Pakistani nationals were injured at Khor Fakkan port in the United Arab Emirates. The injuries resulted from debris falling during ...

item.title: NASA’s Long-Term Vision for Nuclear Propulsion and Human Missions to Mars
item.description: In this Politico video published on April 2, 2026, NASA officials and aerospace experts discuss the agency’s ambitious roadmap for deep space exploration. The conversation focuses on the development o...

item.title: Easter Water Safety in South Africa: Avoiding Drowning Risks at Beaches, Rivers, and Dams
item.description: As South Africans prepare for the Easter holidays, authorities are issuing serious warnings about the increased risk of drowning across the country. The National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI) cautions t...

item.title: Ellerston Capital to Take Major Stake in Winning Group Ahead of ASX Listing
item.description: Ellerston Capital, an investment firm known for managing the fortunes of some of Sydney’s wealthiest families, is set to invest $100 million in Winning Group, an online appliance retailer preparing fo...

item.title: IBP and Senior Citizens Party Partner to Provide Legal Assistance
item.description: The Integrated Bar of the Philippines (IBP) and the Senior Citizens Party-List have officially teamed up to provide legal assistance to senior citizens nationwide. This collaboration, formalized throu...

item.title: The resurgence and global success of Australian indie game studios
item.description: Australia's video game industry has undergone a remarkable transformation over the past two decades, moving from near-collapse to global recognition through the rise of independent studios. Early chal...

item.title: Senior Russian Air Force Commander Dies in Crimea Plane Crash
item.description: A senior Russian Air Force commander, Alexander Otroshchenko, tragically lost his life in a military transport plane crash in Crimea on 31 March 2026. The An-26 aircraft collided with a cliff, resulti...

item.title: Kardashian-Jenner family shares lavish Easter celebration on social media
item.description: The Kardashian-Jenner family marked Easter with a lavish private gathering at Kylie Jenner’s Palm Springs mansion, sharing highlights across Instagram. Kris Jenner posted images of the family reunion,...

item.title: ANC Faction Moves to Form New Coalitions, Challenging Unity Government
item.description: A significant faction within the African National Congress (ANC) is challenging President Cyril Ramaphosa's unity government, advocating for new alliances with the Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) and ...

item.title: Trusting Your Gut: How Spontaneous Choices Shaped Samia’s Journey
item.description: This SBS Insight article explores how intuition and spontaneous decision-making can shape lives, sometimes in unpredictable ways. It begins with Samia Goudie, who as a teenager in the 1970s hitchhiked...

item.title: US Aircraft Downed in Iran During Rescue Mission: Pictures of Wreckage Emerge
item.description: According to recent reports, a US F‑15E Strike Eagle was shot down over Iran’s southwestern terrain on Friday, and an A‑10 attack jet involved in the subsequent search and rescue operation was also do...

item.title: Kenyan Nurse Esther Sitienei Passes Away in UK After Long Battle with Cancer
item.description: Esther Sitienei, a dedicated Kenyan nurse who spent over 30 years serving in healthcare both in Kenya and the UK, has passed away after a four-year struggle with cancer. She worked in the Intensive Th...

item.title: Taiwan Opposition Leader Cheng Li-wun Embarks on Peace Mission Amid Rising China Tensions
item.description: Taiwan’s opposition leader Cheng Li-wun, head of the Kuomintang (KMT), is set to travel to China on Tuesday in what she calls a peace mission, possibly meeting President Xi Jinping. Her visit comes at...

item.title: Kenya’s domestic debt grows faster as Treasury leans on local market to fund budget gaps
item.description: Kenya’s domestic debt has surged by about Sh316 billion to reach Sh7.15 trillion as of March 2026, according to fresh data from the Central Bank of Kenya. This marks a quicker buildup compared to last...

item.title: Key Lunar Questions the Artemis Program Aims to Answer
item.description: For decades, humans assumed the moon was a barren, simple satellite. However, orbiting instruments and robotic missions have revealed a far more complex lunar environment. NASA's Artemis program marks...

item.title: Supreme Court’s 2025 ruling wrongly linked to Sara Duterte’s ongoing impeachment case
item.description: Rappler’s fact-check clarifies that a Facebook post claiming the Supreme Court has dismissed Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment case is misleading. The viral post, shared on March 30, features ...

item.title: ODM to Demand 50-50 Government Share in Deal with Ruto Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: In a recent statement, Gladys Wanga, the chairperson of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM), emphasized the party’s stance on negotiating a fair share in any coalition deal with the United Democratic...
